data.content: Shipment review approved. Verified: commit 2129bcfbf938 is on main, all CI workflows green (Repo Hygiene, Release, Changesets), make sanity passes locally (95.12% coverage). state_hierarchy.rs has 100% line coverage (105/105). Implementation correctly blocks parent state advancement past children, requires approval for terminal cascades, and cascades all descendants on approval. Error codes (hierarchy_progress_blocked, terminal_cascade_approval_required) are distinct and informative. 10 unit tests + 5 CLI integration tests cover all cases including cycles and deferred states. No invariants to check. No regressions detected.
